notes: 8-clip mix, ALL Liam (was Liam+Alice in r1). Fixes: (1) VO overlap at 16-18.91s now eliminated by remixing with single voice and new timing; (2) audience/results view added via Preview mode with previewInteractions (type + submit); (3) single-voice policy now compliant. Checks: no overlap, all clips Liam.

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words — no fixed choices, just real responses.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words — no fixed choices, just real responses.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific enough to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific enough to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Pick Grid to show all responses at once, or One by one to reveal them individually.
steps.tts_text: Pick Grid to show all responses at once, or One by one to reveal them individually.

steps.display_text: Toggle on Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to fine-tune your slide.
steps.tts_text: Toggle on Time limit, Hide results, or Allow images to fine-tune your slide.

steps.display_text: When your audience joins, they type their answer here and hit Submit.
steps.tts_text: When your audience joins, they type their answer here and hit Submit.

steps.display_text: Each response appears live — hit Present to go live.
steps.tts_text: Each response appears live — hit Present to go live.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-r2-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s08.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=9000|9000[a3];[4:a]adelay=12000|12000[a4];[5:a]adelay=16500|16500[a5];[6:a]adelay=21500|21500[a6];[7:a]adelay=26500|26500[a7];[8:a]adelay=30000|30000[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-r2-narrated.webm
